org.exist.schema.internalaccess
Class InternalSchemaAccess

java.lang.Object
  org.exist.schema.internalaccess.InternalSchemaAccess
All Implemented Interfaces:
SchemaAccess
public class InternalSchemaAccess
extends java.lang.Object
implements SchemaAccess

Provides server-internal access to the schema store. This has the advantage of being a lot faster than taking the detour via the SchemaService. In addition to that you can also access schema definitions from places where you have lost track of the context collection.

Author:
seb
